name: Neo4j

composio_registry_match.name: Neo4J
composio_registry_match.description: Graph database platform for connected data and real-time analytics

description: A graph database platform for managing highly connected data, supporting advanced analytics, AI agent memory, and knowledge graph construction.
notes: Authentication relies on standard database connection strings or Aura API keys/tokens. Neo4j officially supports the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for AI integration as indicated in the documentation site.
